headerDisplay: Tuya Color Light v3.4 local LAN controller. Run 'npm run tuya -- fetch-keys' or use the Bootstrap panel below to fetch device keys from the Tuya IoT Platform (once only).

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat Interval (seconds)
heartbeatInterval.description: How often to ping each device to verify the connection is alive.

reconnectAttempts.title: Reconnect Attempts
reconnectAttempts.description: How many consecutive connection failures before marking a device as unreachable in HomeKit.
